fields.name: Destination Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the Destination Account.

fields.name: Destination Account Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the Destination Account.

fields.name: Destination Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the Destination Account.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount to be allocated to the Destination Account.

fields.name: Breakdown Account Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the Breakdown Account that is used to calculate the amount to be distributed to the destination account.

fields.name: Breakdown Account Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance of the Breakdown Account that is used to calculate the amount to be distributed to the destination account.

fields.name: Breakdown Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the Breakdown Account that is used to calculate the amount to be distributed to the destination account.

fields.name: Percentage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage that is used to calculate the amount to be assinged to the destination account.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity to be allocated to the Destination Account.
